resume.raw_text:
=== Khristal Aquino Cruz - Resume (Data Entry).pdf ===
Khristal Aquino Cruz
Potsdam, NY 13699 - (787) 560-1888 - aquinokm@clarkson.edu 

OBJECTIVE

Detail-oriented and dependable college student with experience supporting project coordination, record management, 
scheduling, and client communication in fast-paced environments. Strong organizational and multitasking skills with the 
ability to work independently and maintain accurate documentation. Experienced using Microsoft Office, Google 
Workspace, and digital record systems. Bilingual in English and Spanish with strong communication and problem-solving 
abilities.

EDUCATION

Clarkson University - Bachelor of Science in Mechanical Engineering
Building Skills NY / Commonpoint - Construction Training:

Spring 2028
Potsdam, NY

● OSHA-30, F-60, SST-10, SCA-211, Flagger,  NCCER Core 6 + Green Building Training, Silica Awareness

EXPERIENCE

Commonpoint
Intern

February 2025 - August 2025

Bronx, NY

● Assisted with project coordination, scheduling, and administrative support for community-based programs.
● Maintained accurate digital records, certification files, and documentation.
● Supported daily operations by communicating with clients and confirming appointments.
● Organized and updated information to ensure records remained accurate and accessible.
● Worked independently and collaboratively to complete tasks in fast-paced environments.
● Provided bilingual support to English- and Spanish-speaking clients.

Clarkson University
Social Event Coordinator / Residential Assistant / Student Life Assistant

         October 2023 - December 2024
Potsdam, NY

● Coordinated event logistics, schedules, and operational support for campus activities.
● Managed equipment tracking, organization, and detailed records for events.
● Communicated with multiple departments to ensure smooth daily operations.
● Assisted students by providing information, support, and problem resolution.
● Maintained organized schedules and communicated important information to students and staff.
● Assisted with resolving student concerns and supporting residential operations.
● Balanced multiple responsibilities while maintaining professionalism and reliability.
● Organized schedules, attendance records, and event logistics.
● Assisted with budgeting, planning, and coordination of multiple events.
● Maintained accurate tracking and communication for event operations.

Legacy Volleyball Club
Assistant Coach

    April 2023 to June 2023
Bronx, NY

● Helped coordinate practices and team activities while maintaining organized schedules.
● Communicated effectively with athletes, parents, and staff.
● Demonstrated leadership, teamwork, and reliability in a structured environment.

SKILLS

-Data Entry & Record Management 

-Attention to Detail 

-Microsoft Office 

-Time Management 

-Team Collaboration 

-Digital Communication 

-File Organization & Documentation 

-Scheduling & Calendar Coordination 

-Organization & Accuracy 

-Multitasking 

-Fast-Paced Work Environments 

-Bilingual Communication (English & Spanish) 

 
 

=== Khristal Aquino Cruz - Resume (Engineering).pdf ===
Khristal Aquino Cruz
Potsdam, NY 13699 - (787) 560-1888 - aquinokm@clarkson.edu 

EDUCATION

Clarkson University - Bachelor of Science in Mechanical Engineering
• Engineering Design • CAD Design • Statics • Materials Science • Shop Skills • Welding Procedures
Building Skills NY / Commonpoint - Construction Training
• OSHA-30, SST-10, NCCER Core 6, Green Building Training, Silica Awareness, F-60, SCA-211, 4-Hour Flagger 

 Spring 2028
Potsdam, NY

ENGINEERING PROJECTS 

Mechanical Component Design | SolidWorks
• Designed and modeled engine components and a jack stand using SolidWorks.
• Created detailed part models, assemblies, and technical drawings while applying engineering design principles.
• Evaluated dimensions, fit, and component functionality through iterative design improvements.
Whiteface Mountain Terrain Modeling & Additive Manufacturing | MATLAB & 3D Printing
• Developed MATLAB code to generate a three-dimensional terrain model of Whiteface Mountain using elevation and 
dimensional data.
• Converted computational output into a manufacturable model and produced a physical prototype using 3D printing.
• Applied programming, data visualization, and additive manufacturing techniques to create an accurate scaled 
representation.
Custom 3D Printed Recognition Award
• Designed and fabricated a custom Frankenstein-themed award for a university professor using additive manufacturing 
techniques.
• Applied design-for-manufacturing principles throughout the development process.
Arduino Automatic Traffic Light System
• Designed and programmed an Arduino-based automatic traffic light system using microcontroller logic and electronic 
components.
• Developed timing sequences to simulate real-world traffic signal operation.
• Integrated LEDs and circuit components while applying fundamental programming and electrical concepts.
• Tested and refined system performance through troubleshooting and iterative design improvements.

EXPERIENCE

  February 2025 - August 2025

Commonpoint
Apprentice
Bronx, NY
• Coordinated project documentation, scheduling activities, and compliance records for construction and community 
development projects.
• Managed certification tracking and workforce documentation to support project readiness.
• Communicated with clients, contractors, and team members to support daily operations and project coordination.
• Utilized bilingual communication skills to assist English- and Spanish-speaking stakeholders.
• Worked effectively in fast-paced environments requiring adaptability, organization, and attention to detail. 
Clarkson University
Social Event Coordinator / Residential Assistant / Student Life Assistant
• Coordinated logistics, scheduling, safety planning, and operational support for campus events and recreational programs.
• Collaborated with multiple university departments to organize events, manage resources, and ensure successful program 
execution.
• Served as a primary point of contact for students, providing guidance, mentorship, conflict resolution, and resource 
coordination.
• Developed and maintained event timelines, schedules, registration records, and budget tracking systems.
• Managed equipment usage and operational documentation while ensuring activities remained organized and on schedule.
• Fostered an inclusive residential community by supporting first-year students through academic, social, and personal 
transitions.

            October 2023 - December 2024

Potsdam, NY

 
 TECHNICAL SKILLS

CAD & Engineering Software:
SolidWorks (Parts, Assemblies, Technical Drawings), MATLAB, OpenRocket, C++, Inkscape
Manufacturing & Fabrication:
MIG Welding, TIG Welding, Stick Welding, 3D Printing, Surface Grinding, Band Saw Operation, Shop Safety 
Procedures
Engineering:
Mechanical Design, Engineering Drawings, Technical Documentation, Additive Manufacturing, Design Analysis
Professional:
Project Coordination, Leadership, Team Collaboration, Problem Solving, Bilingual Communication (English & Spanish)

 

=== Khristal Aquino Cruz - Resume (General).pdf ===
Khristal Aquino Cruz 
Potsdam, NY 13699 - (787) 560-1888 - aquinokm@clarkson.edu 

EDUCATION 

Clarkson University - Bachelor of Science in Mechanical Engineering 

●  Relevant Coursework: MT-51 (Basic Shop Skills), MT-55 (Welding Procedures)   

                       Potsdam, NY 
                        Spring 2028 
              Bronx, NY 
●  Construction Training - OSHA 30, F-60, Silica Awareness, SST, Supported Scaffold User, Flagger, NCCER Core 6 + 
April 2025 

Building Skills NY / CommonPoint  

Green Building Certification 

EXPERIENCE 

Commonpoint   
Intern   

Bronx, NY 
 May 2025 to August 2025 

●  Supported project coordination and documentation for construction and community-based projects, ensuring compliance 

and accurate recordkeeping. 

●  Handled client communications by answering service questions, confirming appointments, and clearly explaining 

available programs. 

●  Maintained training and certification records to support team organization and efficiency. 
●  Demonstrated reliability, adaptability, and initiative in fast-paced environments to meet project goals. 
●  Used bilingual communication (English/Spanish) to assist a diverse client base and enhance service accessibility. 

Clarkson University 
Student Life Assistant 

         Potsdam, NY 
                    August 2024 - December 2024 

●  Coordinated logistics and safety plans for campus events and recreational programs. 
●  Communicated with multiple departments to ensure projects and events ran smoothly. 
●  Served as a point of contact for students, providing clear guidance and conflict resolution when needed. 
●  Managed detailed schedules, tracked equipment use, and maintained accurate records for event operations. 
●  Developed strong multitasking, organization, and problem-solving skills applicable to dynamic project environments. 
                June 2024 - August 2024 

Residential Assistant 

●  Manage and teach First Year Experience students 
●  Provided support to students by addressing their unique needs, offering personalized academic assistance. 
●  Address conflicts and be a point of contact to mediate/resolve any dispute between students and coworkers. 

Social Event Coordinator 

October 2023 to May 2024 

●  Created detailed timelines and budgets for events to meet all deadlines.  
●  Brainstormed and implemented creative event concepts and themes.  
●  Oversaw event registration process by collecting and tracking attendee information. 

Legacy Volleyball Club 
Assistant Coach 

 Bronx, NY  
         September 2022 to June 2023 

●  Managed drills and fitness circuits to bolster athletes' coordination and performance levels.  
●  Provided support during practice sessions, offering feedback and guidance to improve players' performance and teamwork. 
●  Provided feedback, encouragement, and structured training support, fostering discipline and collaboration. 

SKILLS 

-Project Coordination & Documentation  
-Site Safety & Compliance (OSHA 30, F-60, SST, NCCER) 
-Event Coordination & Improvement Strategies   
-Team Collaboration & Adaptability to Fast Pace    
-Time Management & Reliability 
-Google Drive, Adobe, Excel (Advanced) | QuickBooks (Basic)   
-Bilingual: Spanish (Native), English (Fluent) 

-Client Communication & Appointment Management 
-Incident Prevention & Safety Awareness 
-Administrative Support & Record Organization 
-Attention to Detail & Strong Memory Retention 
-Budget Tracking & Inventory Management 
-Organization & File Management 
-High Energy, Friendly Attitude, Strong Work Ethic
